strategy: Attack with Fire or Myth (+30%); it resists Ice 40%.
Watch for the mark: a marked wizard must cast a Charm (any blade) within 2 rounds or take a 0-pip Colossal Blizzard. Always keep a blade in hand to dump when marked, which doubles as setup.
Since the required Charm is just a blade, stack blades naturally to satisfy the mark while building damage.
It is only 4,225 health, so a couple of blades into a boosted Fire or Myth hit ends it.
cheatNotes: When you are marked, cast any Charm (a blade works) within 2 rounds or eat a huge 0-pip Blizzard. Keep a blade ready, which also builds your setup.
